activities_projects.title: Main Characters Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the important characters in the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the main characters in the story
Write one line describing each character

activities_projects.title: Description of the Happy Prince
activities_projects.objective: Understand the description of the statue
steps: Find the paragraph describing the Happy Prince
Write 3–4 sentences about how the statue looks
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands descriptive details in the story

activities_projects.title: Role of the Swallow
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of the swallow in the story
steps: Read the parts about the swallow
Write 3–4 sentences about how the swallow helps the prince

activities_projects.title: Acts of Kindness
activities_projects.objective: Identify the kind actions done by the prince
steps: Find the places where the prince helps people
Write three examples of his kindness

activities_projects.title: Helping the Poor
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the prince helps poor people
steps: Identify the poor people helped in the story
Write their problems and how the prince helps them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands social message in the story

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
steps: Identify four important events in the story
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
activities_projects.objective: Learn new words from the story
steps: Select five difficult words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Use each word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Feelings of the Swallow
activities_projects.objective: Understand the emotions of the swallow
steps: Read the ending of the story
Write 3–4 sentences about why the swallow stays with the prince

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Identify the message of the story
steps: Think about what the story teaches
Write the moral in your own words

activities_projects.title: Personal Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real life
steps: Think about helping others in real life
Write 3–4 sentences about why helping people is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects story values with real life
